name: code-quality
description: Automatic linting with ast-grep/ruff/ty, code review patterns, desloppify health scoring, and refactoring agents. Includes PR review, issue resolution, PR comment resolution, and CI failure diagnosis. Hooks run on every file edit.

attribution.modifications: Added PR code reviewer, issue resolver, PR comment resolver, and CI failure diagnoser agents. Renamed original code-reviewer to plan-reviewer.
